description: Create a multi-currency investment portfolio in Portfolio Performance with EUR as the base currency. Set up two deposit accounts named "EUR Cash Account" (EUR) and "USD Cash Account" (USD), and two securities accounts named "EUR Securities" and "USD Securities" linked to their respective cash accounts. Add Allianz SE (ISIN: DE0008404005, EUR) and Apple Inc (ISIN: US0378331005, USD). Record initial deposits of 10,000.00 EUR into the EUR Cash Account and 10,000.00 USD into the USD Cash Account on 2024-01-02. On 2024-01-15, record the purchase of 20 shares of Allianz SE at 242.50 EUR/share (9.90 EUR fees) in the EUR Securities account and 25 shares of Apple Inc at 185.00 USD/share (4.95 USD fees) in the USD Securities account. Save the portfolio to /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/multicurrency_portfolio.xml.
